title: AxGraves
description: A lightweight grave (death chest) plugin focused on performance & compatibility.
body:
![banner](https://i.imgur.com/IhchHVT.png)
\
[![discord](https://i.imgur.com/VhyFGGE.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)
[![wiki](https://i.imgur.com/vSBacK8.png)](https://artillex-studios.github.io/Documentation/axgraves.html)
\
![page](https://i.imgur.com/f2zJ3kb.png)
### <center>**If you need Commissions, Support, or Variations**</center>
[![commissions](https://i.imgur.com/4H9LphL.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)

<details>
<summary>Text Transcript</summary>
AxGraves
A lightweight plugin with lootable death chests

WHAT IS AXGRAVES?
A very lightweight grave (lootable death chest) plugin designed for the greatest performance and compatibility

FEATURES

Very Performant
Most things are handled on another thread

Simple
Only a few lines to configure

Packet based
Nothing is stored in the world file

DEVELOPER API
(4 events)

BLACKLIST
You can ban it from specific worlds if you want

COMPATIBILITY
Supports most plugins that edit the inventory on death
</details>
